blockingIssues.description: RecoveryPhrase XML sanitization only runs for dump names starting with `recovery-phrase`, so failure-path dumps like `window_dump.xml` and `flow-error.xml` can still capture mnemonic-bearing cells if the flow errors while the RecoveryPhrase screen is visible.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify that mission-specific `ci-runner` fix features may edit and push workflow/script code when the feature contract explicitly requires remediation work, or assign those fixes to a code-edit skill instead.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both `fix-debug-emulator-always-capture-artifacts` and `fix-sanitize-recovery-phrase-uiautomator-dump` were assigned to `ci-runner` but required code edits plus commit/push, while `.factory/skills/ci-runner/SKILL.md` still frames the skill as verification-only.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Extend the ci-runner secret-leak review procedure to cover uploaded UI-dump XML files, not just `logcat-*.txt`, because RecoveryPhrase leaks can survive in `window_dump.xml`/`flow-error.xml` even when screenshots are protected by `FLAG_SECURE`.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Round 1 found a mnemonic leak in `recovery-phrase.xml`, and round 2 still found a blocking leak path through unnamed/error XML dumps because the current skill guidance only instructs mnemonic/hex scans on logcat files.

rejectedObservations.observation: Document the `reactivecircus/android-emulator-runner` step-shape and adb-lifecycle constraints in `.factory/library/environment.md`.
rejectedObservations.reason: documentation-only knowledge update; not applied in this validator run because worker instructions prohibit doc changes unless explicitly requested.
